description_long: This is a blue athletic sneaker with a low-cut profile, featuring a prominent white criss-cross stripe design on both sides, characteristic of the Onitsuka Tiger brand. The upper appears to be made of synthetic leather or coated fabric, with stitched paneling and a rounded toe. The lacing system uses standard eyelets and blue laces, and the tongue is padded for comfort. The heel area is reinforced with a green accent strip, and the outsole is thin with a slightly textured edge, likely made of rubber for grip. The interior is lined with a dark material, and the brand's logo is visible on the heel tab. The shoe shows minimal signs of wear, maintaining a clean and well-kept appearance.
description: A blue Onitsuka Tiger sneaker with white criss-cross stripes, green heel accents, and blue laces, in clean and lightly used condition.
description_view_0: Front and top view showing the blue laces, padded tongue, and white side stripes.
description_view_1: Rear and side view highlighting the green heel accent, heel tab with logo, and white stripes.
description_view_2: Side profile view displaying the full length of the white criss-cross stripes and green heel detail.
description_view_3: Angled front view emphasizing the toe box, lacing, and side stripe design.
attribute_logo: White 'Tiger' logo on blue heel tab at the back of the shoe.
